message:
bd-2md12: CrashPack format + manifest for Spork failures

Implements the deterministic crash pack format with:
- CrashPackConfig: seed, config_hash, worker_count for reproduction
- FailureInfo + FailureOutcome: triggering failure description
- SupervisionSnapshot: supervision decision log entries
- EvidenceEntrySnapshot: serializable projection of EvidenceEntry
- CrashPackManifest: schema version, fingerprint, event count
- CrashPack + CrashPackBuilder: builder pattern with deterministic
  ordering (supervision log sorted by vt, violations sorted/deduped)

14 tests covering builder, equality, ordering, accessors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
